deep_dive.title: Tracking Intermittent Particles with Self-Learned Visual Features
deep_dive.abstract: In time-lapse fluorescence imaging, single-particle-tracking is a powerful tool to monitor the dynamics of objects of interest, and extract information about biological processes. However, tracked particles can be subject to occlusion and intermittent detectability. When these phenomena persist over a few frames, tracking algorithms tend to produce multiple tracklets for the same particle. In this work, we introduce self-supervised learning of visual features to compare tracked particles, and we exploit both visual and positional distances to robustly stitch tracklets representing the same particle. We demonstrate the performance of our stitching framework on time-lapse fluorescence sequences of Hydra vulgaris neurons. Results show high stitching precision, and reduction of errors made by previous algorithms on the same data by a factor of two.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: self-supervised learning for intermittent particle tracking
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 自监督学习用于间歇性粒子跟踪
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 自监督学习用于间歇性粒子跟踪
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 自监督学习用于间歇性粒子跟踪
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Uses self-supervised visual features to stitch tracklets of intermittent particles in time-lapse fluorescence imaging.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 时间序列荧光成像中粒子常因遮挡间歇可见，导致跟踪断裂为多个短轨迹。本文引入自监督学习视觉特征，结合位置距离将属于同一粒子的轨迹片段拼接起来，在Hydra神经元数据上获得高拼接精度。该方法可推广至其他视觉跟踪场景。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 时间序列荧光成像中粒子常因遮挡间歇可见，导致跟踪断裂为多个短轨迹。本文引入自监督学习视觉特征，结合位置距离将属于同一粒子的轨迹片段拼接起来，在Hydra神经元数据上获得高拼接精度。该方法可推广至其他视觉跟踪场景。

quick_skim.title: Affordance-Based Manipulation Planning with Text Goals and Sim-to-Real Generalisation via Real-to-Sim Image Conversion
quick_skim.abstract: We present a manipulation planning system based on affordance recognition and action effect prediction. The system reasons through possible futures in visual form, and evaluates candidate plans by agreement of predicted outcomes with text-based goals set at run-time, using a multi-modal goal-matching module. Positions of objects named in the goal text are tracked through predictions even when occluded, making it possible to generate action plans even when objects become occluded, or when their initial descriptors cease to identify them in future states. We further expand the system with an image conversion module for translating real-world state images with objects of varied shapes and visual appearances into a consistent visual appearance, to facilitate manipulation planning in a physical robot setup. We evaluate performance of the system's modules in isolation and demonstrate the integrated system's manipulation planning capabilities on a set of challenging tasks in both simulation and on hardware.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: tracks object positions for manipulation planning, relevant to visual object tracking
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 在操作规划中跟踪物体位置，与视觉目标跟踪相关
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 在操作规划中跟踪物体位置，与视觉目标跟踪相关
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 在操作规划中跟踪物体位置，与视觉目标跟踪相关
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Presents a manipulation planning system that tracks object positions through predictions, maintaining tracking even under occlusion. The tracking component is directly relevant to visual object tracking.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出一种基于功能识别和动作效果预测的操作规划系统。系统通过视觉形式推理可能的未来状态，并利用多模态目标匹配模块评估候选计划与文本目标的一致性。规划中通过预测持续跟踪物体位置，即使在遮挡下也能维持跟踪，这一跟踪组件与视觉目标跟踪任务直接相关。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文提出一种基于功能识别和动作效果预测的操作规划系统。系统通过视觉形式推理可能的未来状态，并利用多模态目标匹配模块评估候选计划与文本目标的一致性。规划中通过预测持续跟踪物体位置，即使在遮挡下也能维持跟踪，这一跟踪组件与视觉目标跟踪任务直接相关。
